title: Marketing Consultant | Automation (m/w/d)
summary: Boru brings 4+ years of marketing management and project coordination experience with strong analytical skills, dashboard design (Power BI, Looker Studio), funnel analysis, and agile methods (Scrum/SAFe) that align well with the role's reporting and project management demands. However, there are two notable gaps: German proficiency is B1+ versus the required fluent (C1/C2) level, and hands-on Marketing Automation tool experience (e.g. HubSpot, Marketo, Salesforce Marketing Cloud) is absent from the CV. The lead generation and CRM campaign execution experience required is only partially evidenced.
recommended_emphasis: Highlight funnel & conversion analysis experience at Intelligent Power Corporation and GRG Banking as direct evidence of lead funnel ownership
Emphasise Power BI and Looker Studio dashboard design as alignment with the KPI reporting dashboard responsibility
Showcase Scrum and SAFe agile experience (JIRA/Confluence) to match the explicit agile methods requirement
Frame HSBC PMO role's budget controlling, timing management, and stakeholder reporting as project management credibility
Position the Marketing Manager and Product Marketing Manager titles to match the seniority and scope (3-5 years) the JD requires
missing_skills: Hands-on Marketing Automation platform experience (e.g. HubSpot, Marketo, ActiveCampaign, Salesforce Marketing Cloud)
Technical CRM implementation or configuration (not just analytical use)
Customer Journey mapping and automation workflow design
Lead magnet conception and lead nurturing campaign execution
German fluency at C1/C2 level — current B1+ is below the 'fließend' requirement
risk_flags: German language gap: JD requires 'fließend Deutsch in Wort und Schrift' — B1+ is likely insufficient for client-facing consultancy in Germany
No Marketing Automation tooling listed in CV — this is a core technical competency for the role, not merely a nice-to-have
Role appears client-facing and agency-based; candidate's agency experience is limited
